Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, arbitrary(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh") AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh__arbitrary" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/3a52e43d7ad685aefd6c2fb2004a2fc3bc9baa4bf47495774183fdd9003b4ad1/86ba0c67-a337-4b52-8be4-24cf99813cbd/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
